backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Smart Watt Nexus backend, implementing user profile management, consumption record storage, and a tiered electricity bill calculation engine with BPL exemption support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the footer copyright text in Layout.tsx was updated to display only '© Smart Watt Nexus' with no third-party branding.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and notable UI/styling changes such as color token updates and new components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, charts, and destructive states.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with the browser tab title set to 'Smart Watt Nexus' and a root div for the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with public routes (login, register) and protected layout routes (dashboard, day-wise usage, reports, bill, profile, about), wrapped in a forced dark ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/ConsumptionAlert: Dismissible alert banner that appears when today's consumption exceeds yesterday's, showing the percentage increase with electric cyan/teal accent styling.
frontend/src/components/ConsumptionChart: Recharts ComposedChart displaying historical consumption as a cyan line and ML forecast predictions as a vivid violet glowing line, with a reference line for average consumption.
frontend/src/components/DemoDataButton.t: Button component with a confirmation dialog that seeds 30 days of sample consumption data into the user's account via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a responsive sidebar navigation, user profile display, and authentication guards that redirect unauthenticated or unregistered users to the appropriate pages.
Form component for manually adding a daily electricity consumption record (date + kWh units) that submits via the useAddConsumptionRecord mutation and shows toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/ModelSelector.ts: Toggle group UI component for selecting among three ML prediction models (Linear Regression, ANN, LSTM-like), exposing the selected value via a controlled onChange prop.
frontend/src/components/MonthNavigator.t: Navigation component with previous/next buttons to move between months, displaying the current month/year and optionally disabling forward navigation beyond a maxDate.
Multi-step onboarding dialog that walks new users through the five main app sections, with localStorage-based dismissal tracking and previous/next step navigation.
frontend/src/components/SlabBreakdownTab: Table component that displays a detailed electricity bill breakdown by tariff slab (units, rate, cost), fixed charges, and total estimated bill from a BillDetails object.
frontend/src/components/TrendIndicator.t: Displays a color-coded trending icon and percentage change comparing today's vs yesterday's energy consumption, with a tooltip showing absolute values and difference.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, consumption records, bill estimates, and role assignments via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines a dark navy/cyan design system with CSS custom properties for colors, charts, and utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static informational page describing Smart Watt Nexus's key features, tech stack, and purpose as a decentralized electricity monitoring platform for Telangana households.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying consumption stats, ML-powered predictions (regression/ANN/LSTM), alerts, and an onboarding guide for new users with no recorded data.
frontend/src/pages/DayWiseUsagePage.tsx: Page showing a monthly bar chart and summary stats (total, average, peak) of daily electricity consumption with month navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/EstimatedBillPage.tsx: Displays an estimated electricity bill for a selected month based on user consumption records, supporting BPL consumer toggle and showing a slab breakdown table using TSSPDCL/TSNPDCL tariff rates.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login page with Internet Identity authentication, redirecting users to registration or the home page based on whether a profile exists.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Allows authenticated users to view and update their profile details (name, email, phone, consumer number) and displays their Internet Identity principal.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Handles new user registration by collecting profile details, requiring Internet Identity authentication first, and assigning a user role upon successful registration.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Shows a monthly consumption report with a detailed records table, summary stats, and a CSV export button for the selected month.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides a CSV export utility for consumption records and a helper function that estimates daily electricity cost using a simplified TS tariff slab calculation.
frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts: Provides date utility functions for converting between bigint timestamps and Date objects, formatting dates, and filtering/grouping consumption records by month or day.
frontend/src/utils/ml/linearRegression.t: Implements a simple least-squares linear regression model to predict future electricity consumption values for a given number of days ahead.
frontend/src/utils/ml/lstmLike.ts: Implements a simplified LSTM-like recurrent neural network with forget, input, cell, and output gates to predict future consumption values from normalized historical data.
frontend/src/utils/ml/neuralNetwork.ts: Implements a feedforward ANN with one hidden layer trained via backpropagation on a sliding window of normalized historical data to predict future consumption values.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (using CSS variables), fonts, border radii, shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling dark mode with several plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 15) for the SmartWatt Nexus electricity monitoring app, listing existing features, architectural notes, and planned integrations like Arduino and ML-based predictions.
